payload.author: agent
payload.body: CI test job red since 66d0deb (RT-58). cargo-trustc steps invoked 'cargo-trustc trust <cmd>' but strip_trust_prefix strips 'trustc' → dispatch forwarded 'trust' to the trust CLI → 'unrecognized subcommand'. Fixed 5 invocations in ci.yml to 'cargo-trustc trustc'. Verified locally: RT-80 (1,2,3), RT-81 (4,5,6)+R0042 reject, RT-89 R0001 reject, RT-82 builds. Commit ea700e7, on PR #2.
